description: preToolUse-Bash-solkan exits 0 for an allowlisted command
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-solkan with 'git status'
Verify exit code is 0

description: preToolUse-Bash-solkan exits 1 for a non-allowlisted command
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-solkan with 'wget evil.com'
Verify exit code is 1

description: preToolUse-Bash-solkan exits 0 for a compound command where all subcommands are allowlisted
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-solkan with 'git status && git log --oneline'
Verify exit code is 0

description: preToolUse-Bash-solkan exits 1 for a compound command with one non-allowlisted subcommand
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-solkan with 'git status && wget evil.com'
Verify exit code is 1

description: preToolUse-Bash-rtk prints the original command when RTK has no equivalent
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-rtk with 'echo hello'
Verify stdout equals 'echo hello'

description: preToolUse-Bash-rtk prints the rewritten command when RTK rewrites
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-rtk with 'git status'
Verify stdout equals 'rtk git status'

description: preToolUse-Bash-rtk is idempotent when command already uses RTK
steps: Call preToolUse-Bash-rtk with 'rtk git status'
Verify stdout equals 'rtk git status'

description: preToolUse-Bash outputs allow with no updatedInput when solkan accepts and RTK does not rewrite
steps: Set PRETOOLUSE_SOLKAN_SCRIPT to a mock that exits 0
Set PRETOOLUSE_RTK_SCRIPT to a mock that prints the input unchanged
Call preToolUse-Bash with a JSON input containing command 'echo hello'
Verify output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision == 'allow'
Verify output JSON has no hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput

description: preToolUse-Bash outputs allow with updatedInput when solkan accepts and RTK rewrites
steps: Set PRETOOLUSE_SOLKAN_SCRIPT to a mock that exits 0
Set PRETOOLUSE_RTK_SCRIPT to a mock that prints 'rtk git status'
Call preToolUse-Bash with a JSON input containing command 'git status'
Verify output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision == 'allow'
Verify output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput.command == 'rtk git status'

description: preToolUse-Bash outputs no permissionDecision and no updatedInput when solkan refuses and RTK does not rewrite
steps: Set PRETOOLUSE_SOLKAN_SCRIPT to a mock that exits 1
Set PRETOOLUSE_RTK_SCRIPT to a mock that prints the input unchanged
Call preToolUse-Bash with a JSON input containing command 'wget evil.com'
Verify output JSON has no hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision
Verify output JSON has no hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput

description: preToolUse-Bash outputs updatedInput but no permissionDecision when solkan refuses and RTK rewrites
steps: Set PRETOOLUSE_SOLKAN_SCRIPT to a mock that exits 1
Set PRETOOLUSE_RTK_SCRIPT to a mock that prints 'rtk git status'
Call preToolUse-Bash with a JSON input containing command 'git status'
Verify output JSON has no hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision
Verify output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput.command == 'rtk git status'

description: preToolUse-Bash preserves original tool_input fields (description) in updatedInput
steps: Set PRETOOLUSE_SOLKAN_SCRIPT to a mock that exits 0
Set PRETOOLUSE_RTK_SCRIPT to a mock that prints 'rtk git status'
Call preToolUse-Bash with JSON containing command 'git status' and description 'Show repo status'
Verify output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput.description == 'Show repo status'
